topics.title: Beatles Music Trivia and Radio Segment Disputes
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where an intern attempts to identify Beatles songs while the hosts debate the quality of the contest and play a pre-recorded clip regarding a dispute over a bar tab.

topics.title: Hostility Over Bar Tab and Top Shelf Liquor
topics.summary: The studio plays a heated recording of an argument between Tracy and Grillo regarding a disputed bar tab and the cost of premium alcohol.

topics.title: Comedy Industry Disputes and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features discussions regarding interpersonal conflicts with staff members, a caller's claims of censorship, and a detailed recount of a dispute between Bob Levy and Dave Chappelle over joke ownership.

topics.title: Comedy Roast Conflicts and Endurance Running
topics.summary: The studio discusses the professional tensions and roast dynamics between comedians Bob Levy and Artie Lange before transitioning to an interview with Dean Karnazes, who is attempting a 24-hour treadmill run to raise money for prostate cancer research.

topics.title: Transsexual Contest and Fitness Discussions
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding fitness goals, the concept of a runner's high, upcoming Howard TV segments, and a competition to identify the most feminine transsexual woman.

topics.title: Transgender Contestants and Sexual Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features two transgender women who discuss their transition surgeries, personal lives, and experiences with intimacy before and after their operations.

topics.title: Miss Post-Op Tranny Contest
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition between two trans women to determine who will be crowned Miss Post-op Tranny and win a $5,000 prize.

topics.title: Radio Show Guest Interactions and Comedy
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including discussions on personal relationships, the transition to radio for comedian Greg Fitzsimmons, and various comedic bits regarding celebrity appearances.

topics.title: Stand-up Comedy and Celebrity Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses the evolution of stand-up comedy, the legacy of various comedians like Bill Cosby and Richard Pryor, and welcomes guest John Bon Jovi.

topics.title: Bon Jovi Career and Industry Challenges
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the band's longevity, their decision to appear on American Idol, the impact of digital music on the industry, and internal band dynamics following a member's rehabilitation.

topics.title: John Bon Jovi Interview and New Album
topics.summary: The studio hosts John Bon Jovi to discuss his new album, upcoming concerts at The Rock in Newark, and the meaning behind his song "Lost Highway."

topics.title: Comedy Dispute Over Stolen Jokes
topics.summary: The studio features a heated argument between comedians Bob Levy and Artie Lange regarding allegations of stolen material and the impact on their professional relationship.

topics.title: Comedy Conflict and Show Wrap-up
topics.summary: The studio features a heated dispute between comedians over joke ownership and professional conduct before transitioning to a review of recent guests and the upcoming schedule.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Film Rankings
topics.summary: The studio discusses Jimmy Kimmel's surgery, a list of celebrities with the best physiques, an upcoming interview with Paris Hilton, and the American Film Institute's rankings of the greatest movies.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including American Idol, celebrity news involving Kelly Clarkson and Kobe Bryant, political updates on stem cell research and mayoral candidates, and various local news stories.
